hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); c=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); print('Rule: simple shell commands — avoid && / || chains; split into sequential Bash calls unless the entire compound is read-only.') if '&&' in c or '||' in c else None"

python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); print('nix config edited — rebuild required: sudo darwin-rebuild switch --flake ~/.dotfiles/nix#ranolp-work-MBP-26') if 'nix/home/configs/' in p else None"
